notes: HAR-783 live Shopify 2026-04 evidence for app-discount Function identifier validation. The active conformance app exposes payment, validation, and cart-transform Functions but no discount Function, so the scenario captures validation-only branches that do not create discounts: missing identifier, multiple identifiers, unknown functionId, wrong Function API via the released cart-transform Function handle, missing automatic identifier, and unknown automatic functionHandle. The proxy earns Function metadata through cassette-backed shopifyFunctions(handle:) lookups during replay.
